THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMUNOVICH, SARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MITCHELL, UNDRA T $373.27 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $373.27, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
